description: Heel: 3& rdquo Black pointy toed heels with a midfoot buckled strap and stitch detail along the mouth of the shoe Plaid inner, a soft footbed and a brand badge at the lateral side of the shoe Thick, tapering heel with a plastic heel cap TPR outsole15 days warranty for sole debonding only; no warranty on studs, sequins or other accessories (warranty not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
